title.en: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
title.th: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world

summary.en: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
summary.th: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
